name: Stromboli
recipeIngredient: 2 (1 lb each) frozen bread dough, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the dough rise in a warm place until doubled in size.
2. Punch down the dough and roll it into one 15x12 inches rectangle.
3. Layer ham and pepperoni on half of the dough (lengthwise).
4. Sprinkle onion and green pepper over the layers.
5. Add 1/4 cup pizza sauce.
6. Place mozzarella, bologna, salami, and Swiss cheese on top.
7. Sprinkle with basil, oregano, garlic powder, and pepper.
8. Spread another 1/4 cup of pizza sauce on top.
9. Fold the plain half of the dough over the filling and seal edges well.
10. Place the stromboli on an ungreased baking pan measuring 15x10x1 inches.
11. Bake at 375°F for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown.
12. Brush with melted butter before serving.
13. Heat remaining pizza sauce and serve with sliced stromboli.
